typography.latinFallback: Inter, SF Pro Display, Segoe UI, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif
typography.chineseFallback: Noto Sans CJK SC, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
typography.note: SVG wordmark uses editable text with fallback fonts; convert text to outlines in final design tooling if exact rendering is required. No font files are included.
